---
title: "Diversity Analysis: Apheresis vs Product"
subtitle: "TCR Repertoire Analysis — Notebook 02"
author: "Joshua Luthy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    css: "../www/report-style.css"
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Analysis Overview

This notebook quantifies the **change in TCR repertoire diversity** from Apheresis
to the manufactured drug Product. We compare multiple diversity indices and stratify
by clinical response (CR, PR, PD).

```{r load-data}
diversity_df <- read_csv("../data/processed/diversity_metrics.csv")
```

## Shannon Entropy Comparison

```{r shannon-test}
aph_shannon <- diversity_df %>% filter(sample_type == "Apheresis") %>% pull(shannon_entropy)
prod_shannon <- diversity_df %>% filter(sample_type == "Product") %>% pull(shannon_entropy)

wilcox.test(aph_shannon, prod_shannon, paired = TRUE)
```

```{r shannon-plot}
ggplot(diversity_df, aes(x = sample_type, y = shannon_entropy, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Apheresis" = "#00d4ff", "Product" = "#7b2fff")) +
  labs(y = "Shannon Entropy (H)", x = NULL, title = "Shannon Entropy: Apheresis vs Product") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## Clonality Index

```{r clonality-plot}
ggplot(diversity_df, aes(x = sample_type, y = clonality, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Apheresis" = "#00d4ff", "Product" = "#7b2fff")) +
  labs(y = "Clonality (1 - H/log N)", x = NULL, title = "Clonality Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## Repertoire Richness & D50

```{r richness-table}
diversity_df %>%
  select(patient_id, sample_type, n_clonotypes, d50) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = c(n_clonotypes, d50)) %>%
  mutate(fold_change = n_clonotypes_Apheresis / n_clonotypes_Product) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 1, caption = "Richness and D50 comparison")
```

## Diversity by Clinical Response

```{r response-plot}
diversity_df %>%
  filter(sample_type == "Product") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = clinical_response, y = shannon_entropy, fill = clinical_response)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.5, width = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("CR" = "#00ff9d", "PR" = "#00d4ff", "PD" = "#ff6b6b")) +
  labs(y = "Shannon Entropy (H)", x = "Clinical Response",
       title = "Product Diversity by Clinical Response") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
